articles.title: Sheetz is quitting VMware, migrating 11,000 virtual machines
articles.content: The convenience store chain will use StorMagic instead.

articles.title: Windows 0-day drops the same day Microsoft releases record number of patches
articles.content: HiveLegacy is a "powerful primitive" that's likely capable of other nefarious actions.
articles.titleZh: Windows 0-day在微软发布创纪录的补丁数量的同一天下降
articles.contentZh: HiveLegacy是一个“强大的原始人” ，可能有能力采取其他邪恶行动。

articles.title: Microsoft’s Secure Boot has been broken for a decade and no one noticed until now
articles.content: Old and forgotten "shims" Microsoft failed to revoke have made Secure Boot bypasses simple.
articles.titleZh: 微软的安全引导已经中断了十年，直到现在还没有人注意到
articles.contentZh: Microsoft未能撤销的旧的和被遗忘的“垫片”使得绕过安全启动变得简单。

articles.title: The US government warns that Russia state hackers are coming after your router
articles.content: With residential proxies all the rage, CISA urges router users to be vigilant.
articles.titleZh: 美国政府警告称，俄罗斯国家黑客正在追捕您的路由器
articles.contentZh: 由于住宅代理风靡一时， CISA敦促路由器用户保持警惕。

articles.title: Skullcandy’s bass-boosting Crusher headphones now come with Bose’s ANC
articles.content: Skullcandy announced a new version of its Crusher wireless headphones today featuring a few of Bose's audio technologies including its QuietControl ANC and head-tracking spatial audio. The Crusher headphone line differentiates itself from the competition through the use of both full-range and dedicated bass drivers in each ear cup to boost deeper frequencies. Skullcandy admits […]
articles.titleZh: Skullcandy的低音增强Crusher耳机现在配备了Bose的ANC
articles.contentZh: Skullcandy今天宣布推出新版Crusher无线耳机，采用Bose的一些音频技术，包括QuietControl ANC和头部跟踪空间音频。Crusher耳机系列通过在每个耳杯中使用全范围和专用低音驱动器来提高更深的频率，从而与竞争对手区分开来。Skullcandy承认[…]

articles.title: HP’s OLED-equipped 2-in-1 laptop is a solid back-to-school deal
articles.content: With storage and memory prices still at an all-time high, we’re happy to tell you about a solid deal on a good laptop when we find one, rare as they are. Best Buy is selling the HP OmniBook X Flip 2 in 1 for $999.99 (usually $1,649.99) with an Intel Core 7 Ultra CPU, 16GB […]
articles.titleZh: 惠普配备OLED的二合一笔记本电脑是稳固的返校协议
articles.contentZh: 由于存储和内存价格仍处于历史最高水平，当我们找到一台不错的笔记本电脑时，我们很乐意告诉您一笔实惠的交易，尽管它们很罕见。百思买正在出售HP OmniBook X Flip 2 in 1 ，售价$ 999.99 （通常为$ 1,649.99 ） ，配备英特尔酷睿7超级CPU ， 16GB […]
